ingredients_text: ORANGE INFUSED SWEETENED DRIED CRANBERRIES (25%) (Cranberries, Sugar, Orange Oil, Sunflower Oil), FLAME RAISINS (20%) (Raisins, Sunflower Oil), WALNUTS (20%), ORANGE OIL ROASTED ALMONDS (15%) (Almonds, Rapeseed Oil, Orange Oil), GOLDEN RAISINS (10%) (Raisins, Sunflower Oil, Preservative: Sulphur Dioxide), ROASTED CASHEW NUTS (10%).
